result: If I could change the world in one way, I would make understanding between people effortless. Imagine if every person could truly comprehend the feelings, histories, and hopes of others—even if they were very different. It wouldn't end all problems, but it could be a start to kindness, cooperation, and new ideas. In that kind of world, I think much else might take care of itself.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
